title: SEC At Stakeholders Public Hearing On Money Laundering
description: L-R,   Chairman Senate Committee on Anti- Corruption and Financial Crimes Sen Suleiman Abdu Kwari, Assistant Director Legal Department Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Francis Okafor and Head Mon
html: L-R,   Chairman Senate Committee on Anti- Corruption and Financial Crimes Sen Suleiman Abdu Kwari, Assistant Director Legal Department Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Francis Okafor and Head Monitoring Department SEC Mr Bassey Mfon during a Stakeholders and the General Public to the Public Hearing on Money Laundering ( Prevention and Prohibition ) Bills 2021(SB 642 and SB 789) at the National Assembly Abuja recently
